DEFENDANT JOSE BERRIOS' DEMURRER TO 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT.

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
JAMES VORHIS, ESQ. OF NOSSAMAN LLP, TEL. 415.438.7267, appearing for Defendant and moving party
VICTOR MARQUEZ, ESQ. OF THE LAW OFFICES OF VICTOR MARQUEZ, TEL. 415.314.7831, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party

The matter was argued. The court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows - DEFENDANT JOSE BERRIOS' DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained with leave to amend to allege that there was an agreement in conformity with the letter attached as Exhibit A to the amended complaint. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Off Calendar Sep-16-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT JOSE BERRIOS DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: Victor M. Marquez, Esq. of The Marquez Law Group 314-7831 for pltf & opposing party; James Vorhis, Esq. of Nossaman LLP 438-7267 for deft & moving party.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION FOR PLAINTIFF TO PLEAD FACTS SHOWING THAT THEY ARE BROUGHT WITHIN THE REQUISITE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE AN ACTIONABLE AGREEMENT THAT DOES NOT VIOLATE THE STATUTE OF FRAUDS AND DAMAGES CAUSED BY ITS BREACH. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FACTS THAT DEMONSTRATE A FIDUCIARY DUTY EXISTS AND BREACH. Order signed in open court. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998
